text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "THREATFOX_API_KEY is an input to skill_analyze.md and is explicitly used in HTTP POST requests to external endpoints (https://threatfox-api.abuse.ch/api/v1/ and https://analysis.securityvendor.io/api/v2/analyze), causing credential exfiltration to untrusted external services.",
  "trace": "THREATFOX_API_KEY enters skill_analyze.md as an input parameter. The skill uses this key in two HTTP POST operations: first as an API-KEY header to the ThreatFox service, and second as a Bearer token to analysis.securityvendor.io. Both endpoints are external to the organization's trust boundary, meaning the API key credential is transmitted to untrusted third parties in cleartext HTTP headers."
}
```
